data.name: WorkTimeSplitGrid_Desc
data.value: Dataset control for Rounded Time Entries: pick an entry and distribute its total duration across work subtypes (Normal/Overtime/Night-Sunday/Holiday); saving creates the split records, marks the original and its pauses as completed, and removes the original.

data.name: entries_Display
data.comment: Display name for the bound dataset

data.name: entries_Desc
data.value: The Rounded Time Entries shown as the master list to be split.

data.name: totalField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the total field override

data.name: totalField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the decimal column holding the entry's total duration. Default: sst_duration.
data.comment: Description for the total field override

data.name: dateField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the date field override

data.name: dateField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the date/time column shown in the list. Default: sst_date.
data.comment: Description for the date field override

data.name: typeField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the type field override

data.name: typeField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the text column holding the entry type (Arbeit/Fahrzeit/Pause). Default: sst_type.
data.comment: Description for the type field override

data.name: pauseValue_Display
data.comment: Display name for the pause value override

data.name: pauseValue_Desc
data.value: Type value that marks a break/pause; these entries are hidden from the list and marked completed on save. Default: Pause.
data.comment: Description for the pause value override

data.name: completedField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the completed flag override

data.name: completedField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the boolean column flagging an entry as already split. Default: sst_worksubtypecompleted.
data.comment: Description for the completed flag override

data.name: subtypeField_Display
data.comment: Display name for the subtype target override

data.name: subtypeField_Desc
data.value: Logical name of the text column on the new split records that stores the subtype name. Default: sst_workordersubtype.
data.comment: Description for the subtype target override
